Item Details:

## login-01

A simple login form.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 2 file(s)

visual_summary: A basic login form with input fields for username and password, accompanied by a submit button. It is commonly used in applications requiring user authentication and authorization. Developers would use this component as part of a registration, login, or forgot password flow.
interaction_tags: enabled only when form is visible
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: login-01
Description: A basic login form with input fields for username and password, accompanied by a submit button. It is commonly used in applications requiring user authentication and authorization. Developers would use this component as part of a registration, login, or forgot password flow.
Style: default, white, clean
Interactions: enabled only when form is visible, submittable on click
Tags: form, login, authentication, registry

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
